taskDescription: Story 5.3: LLM 结构化提取 fallback for eval parsers

userStories.title: T1: llm-fallback core (LlmExtractionResult, llmStructuredExtract)
userStories.description: T1.1-T1.5: Add scoring/parsers/llm-fallback.ts with LlmExtractionResult, LLM_SYSTEM_PROMPT, llmStructuredExtract; fetch /v1/chat/completions; env vars SCORING_LLM_*; AbortSignal.timeout; structure validation + 1 retry; timeout/network → ParseError

userStories.title: T2: Four parsers integrate LLM fallback
userStories.description: T2.1-T2.5: audit-arch/story use extractOverallGrade; audit-prd/arch/story/generic all add LLM fallback when grade is null; check SCORING_LLM_API_KEY before calling llmStructuredExtract
acceptanceCriteria: All four parsers call llmStructuredExtract when extractOverallGrade returns null and API key exists
All four parsers throw ParseError when grade null and no API key
userStories.notes: spec §3.2, plan Phase 2, includes T3 mapping in fallback logic

userStories.title: T3: issues/veto_items mapping to CheckItem
userStories.description: T3.1-T3.2: issues → CheckItem via resolveItemId(stage, description, llm_{stage}_issue_{idx}); severity 高→-10 中→-5 低→-2; veto_items → { item_id, passed: false, score_delta: -10, note: 'veto' }
acceptanceCriteria: LLM result issues map to check_items with correct item_id and score_delta
veto_items merge into check_items with veto semantics
userStories.notes: Implemented within T2 parser fallback logic; spec §3.2.5

userStories.title: T4: Tests (unit + integration + parse-and-write)
userStories.description: T4.1-T4.3: llm-fallback.test.ts 6 cases; audit-prd/arch/story/generic integration tests for regex fail + key + LLM success, regex fail + no key → ParseError; parse-and-write.test.ts LLM fallback e2e
acceptanceCriteria: parse-and-write.test.ts: LLM fallback e2e scenario passes
userStories.notes: TDD: tests written before/when implementing; plan §5

userStories.title: T5: Acceptance commands
userStories.description: T5.1-T5.7: Run all acceptance commands; npm run test:scoring full regression
